description: Composition White sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, with ruffles around the armhole and collar, has a Mandarin collar neck with a buttoned chest placket, has smocking on the upper chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash warm using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron/do not iron on print or embroidery It's all about feeling proud of your feminity and flaunting it with much elan with this white sleeveless top from lee. The smocking on the upper chest and ruffled armholes add to it a girly vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and heeled sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
